title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account not linked to any Tenant
scenario: Support > App data shows correct Tenant and User info when switching from Guest to unlinked account
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app as a Guest user.
2. Navigate to: Home → Support → App info.
3. Verify the displayed App version is correct.
4. Verify Tenant name and Tenant ID fields show 'None'.
7. Log out of the Guest session.
8. Log in with an account that is not linked to any Tenant.
9. Navigate to: Home → Support → App info.
10. Verify Account information (e.g., email/username) is displayed.
11. Verify Tenant name and Tenant ID fields are not present or empty.
expected: When using the app as Guest: App version is correct, Tenant name/ID and User ID are 'None', Last connected is 'Unknown'. After logging in with an account not linked to any Tenant: Account information is displayed, but Tenant name and Tenant ID are not present.
